A couple of bushes coming down the hill opposite the lake right before you get to the little waterfall next to the suspension bridge. 

No one will mind except for the squirrels you are beating out.
2043 Mason Mill Rd, Decatur, GA 30033, USA
Not sure that these are still here. Went looking (Aug/Sept) and found no sign of them. Access: Public.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Located near the corner of Lake Blvd and Lenox Park Blvd NE, Atlanta, GA. Buckhead area off Roxboro Rd. This is a biggie a 17'8" circumference and 86' tall. Park at the Marriot Hotel off Lake Blvd and walk across the street!
